## Source: ghsa-malware (e64c014acdfff35b66e1108e95dc2b19c4883ef91c2ea3fd76c04869af4ec40d)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d1eb9592b2f976d7d487d44c8f45592b2953e5f51edfeee7242e020dfb64176f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-copilot-registry' @ 1.0.6 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
